criteria.criterionText: And every timing, telemetry, receipt, and status value should match canonical JSON proof exactly.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `executable-body-contract.report.md` file, which contains the values to be matched against canonical proof, was not provided. Thus, exact value matching cannot be verified.
